features.title: SSE Dashboard Endpoint
features.description: Implement the Server-Sent Events (SSE) dashboard endpoint for the Web Collaboration Beta (F2-08). Adds the GET /api/v1/events?goal_space_id=<id> stream endpoint and the GET /api/v1/goal-spaces/:id/events?after_id=<event_id>&limit=100 replay endpoint per docs/specs/realtime_events.md § 4 + § 5. The SSE endpoint authenticates via HttpOnly session cookie, parses Last-Event-ID, replays events after the cursor, filters events by per-actor accessibility, opens a text/event-stream, sends heartbeat comments every 15 seconds while idle, and closes cleanly on client abort. The wire-format event type names (snake_case without dots, per realtime_events.md § 2) are translated from the storage-format event type names (dotted form, per the existing F2-04 / F2-05 / F2-06 / F2-07 services). The replay endpoint supports startup hydration, failed reconnects, and tests; unknown / expired after_id returns 409 EVENT_CURSOR_EXPIRED. No new auth, authorization, or audit primitives are introduced.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/events?goal_space_id=<id> returns 200 with Content-Type text/event-stream; 401 without session; 400 INVALID_FIELD for missing goal_space_id; 403 FORBIDDEN if actor has no access; 404 NOT_FOUND for missing goal space.

GET /api/v1/events with Last-Event-ID: <event_id> header replays events with id strictly greater than the cursor BEFORE opening the live stream; replay completes synchronously within the same HTTP response.
GET /api/v1/events live mode opens a ReadableStream that emits new events as they arrive in realtime_events for the goal space; closes cleanly on request.signal.aborted.
GET /api/v1/events heartbeat: emits :heartbeat SSE comment every 15 seconds while idle (format :heartbeat\n\n).

GET /api/v1/events permission filter: filters events by per-actor accessibility (initiator sees all in their goal spaces; non-initiator sees only events on cards / node boards / confirmations / executions they can read).

GET /api/v1/goal-spaces/:id/events?after_id=<event_id>&limit=100 returns 200 with {events, next_after_id?, has_more}; 400 INVALID_FIELD for limit > 500; 409 EVENT_CURSOR_EXPIRED for unknown after_id; events ordered by sequence ASC; default limit=100.

SSE frame format: each event emits id: <id>
event: <wire-type>
data: <json>

 per realtime_events.md § 4.

Wire-format event type mapping: storage card.created → wire card_created; storage human_confirmation.approved → wire confirmation_decided; storage agent_execution.queued → wire ai_role_started; etc. Snapshot-tested.
Event envelope matches RealtimeEvent<T> per realtime_events.md § 2: id, sequence, type, goal_space_id, resource: {type, id}, actor: {type, id?, name?}, data, occurred_at.
EVENT_CURSOR_EXPIRED added to API_ERROR_CODES with HTTP status 410 Gone.
STORAGE_TO_WIRE_TYPE_MAP exported from apps/web/src/lib/realtime/events.ts; snapshot test pins the mapping.
apps/web/src/lib/api/actor.ts is used by both routes (no F2-02 / F2-03 / F2-04 / F2-05 / F2-06 / F2-07 helper duplication).
Realtime event constants from F2-04 / F2-05 / F2-06 / F2-07 are consumed (no new event types introduced).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test passes (the full web suite stays green; F2-07's 511 tests remain green).
pnpm check passes (typecheck + lint + test + build + format:check) with environment warnings only.
No files outside the F2-08 file set or unrelated prior changes are modified (except the documented errors.ts extension).

Run full web suite for regression
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
